props.title: Basic Static Rendering
props.description: Static spec rendering — no state, no actions. The simplest possible Renderer usage.
props.technicalDescription:
Spec
CaseContainer → StaticText("Hello from thin-render!")
State
{} — empty store, no mutations
Features
• Renderer — spec-driven component resolution via registry
• ElementRenderer — memoized per-element rendering
• Spec JSON — declarative layout without imperative JSX
